metadata.title: Insolitus Development — Boutique Development in Los Cabos
metadata.description: A boutique local development company facilitating design & construction in Los Cabos, Mexico.

hero.tagline: Where Vision Meets the Desert & Sea
hero.subtitle: A Boutique Development Company in Los Cabos, Mexico

about.headline: Bespoke Development, Vertically Integrated
about.body: Insolitus is a boutique local development company facilitating design & construction in Los Cabos, Mexico. Our vertical integration generates an important competitive advantage — improved communication, simplified administration, enhanced cooperation and streamlined decision-making. Through our multi-disciplinary team we carry out every aspect of a design or construction project in-house. A bespoke luxury hospitality approach enables our clients to actually enjoy the process of bringing their dream vision into reality.

items.permits: Re-Zoning, Permitting, Licensing & Ecological Impact Approvals

alonso.name: Alonso Ramírez
alonso.bio: 20+ years successful construction track record in Los Cabos. With an impeccable reputation, Alonso has led Ginax serving the luxury private residences & hospitality markets in Los Cabos and Puerto Vallarta.

manu.name: María Manuel Ponte
manu.bio: Graduated from Faculdade de Arquitectura, Universidade de Coimbra, Portugal. Manu's contemporary style blends natural local materials with sustainable practices. Her work integrates architecture with its surrounding environment, drawing from vernacular traditions while incorporating modern solutions — creating spaces that are environmentally responsive and deeply connected to local culture.

rodrigo.name: Rodrigo Caldeira
rodrigo.bio: Born in Rio de Janeiro, raised in Porto, Portugal. Alumni of École Hôtelière de Lausanne, Switzerland. A results-driven leader with a talent for building high-performance teams. His unique combination of luxury resort experience and real estate development is an unfair competitive advantage. Finance-savvy and adept at trend analysis to adapt proactively to market demands.
